testsuite.name: SearchTests

testcase.name: successfulSearchTest()

failure.message: com.codeborne.selenide.ex.ElementNotFound: Element not found {[id=search]} Expected: text "https://selenide.org" Page source: file:/C:/Users/admin/IdeaProjects/magenta_autotest/build/reports/tests/1779292009106.0.html Timeout: 4 s. Caused by: NoSuchWindowException: no such window: target window already closed
